spec_revision: 2 (2026-05-18 — concrete CGC-grounded REQs replacing templated v1)

tasks.title: Bridge-side pair-mode implementation (pair.go) — PIN + pairing key + HKDF + HMAC + cert/JWT
tasks.prompt: (RETROSPECTIVE — shipped.) internal/pair/pair.go implements the bridge side of pair-mode v1 per MESHSAT-594/598. PinLength=6, DefaultArmTTL=90s, JWTTTL=1h. HKDF-SHA256 for shared secret, HMAC-SHA256 for claim verification, Ed25519 for client identity, JSON wire format (NOT CBOR).
tasks._files_owned_note: CGC-verified 2026-05-18: internal/pair/ contains exactly pair.go + pair_test.go. Constants PinLength, DefaultArmTTL, JWTTTL exported. JSON wire format per package docstring (NOT CBOR).

tasks.title: Claim handler wiring (internal/api/ → pair.HandleClaim) + paired_clients schema + JWT middleware
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/001-pair-protocol/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/pair-protocol.feature} AND internal/pair/pair.go for the constructor signatures. SECOND: add the HTTP route /api/v2/pair/claim in internal/api/ that calls pair.HandleClaim. Add the paired_clients schema migration in internal/database/. Add the JWT-verification middleware. Add /api/v2/pair/refresh for JWT refresh per REQ-018. Tests colocated.
